data.title: Elon Musk alleges Trump is in 'Epstein files', and folks are losing it
data.description:
Elon Musk publicly accused Donald Trump of being named in the Epstein files, fueling online backlash and confusion. Crypto Twitter lit up as users reacted to the explosive claim, which remains unverified.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/elon-musk-alleges-trump-is-in-epstein-files-and-folks-are-losing-it

data.title: Arca exec trashes Circle IPO in expletive-laced open letter
data.description:
Arca was one of the earliest crypto investment firms to back Circle, Arca chief investment officer Jeff Dorman wrote in the letter.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/arca-exec-trashes-circle-ipo-open-letter?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Arca CIO Jeff Dorman slams ‘measly’ CRCL allocation from Circle’s oversubscribed IPO
data.description:
Arca CIO Jeff Dorman said the firm received a "measly" $135,000 allocation of Circle's IPO shares, despite placing a $10 million order.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/357218/arca-cio-jeff-dorman-slams-measly-crcl-allocation-from-stablecoin-issuers-oversubscribed-ipo?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Strategy (MSTR) Stock Outpaces Bitcoin With 5% Gain on Midweek Bounce
data.description:
In recent crypto news, midweek, Strategy’s MSTR stock climbed 5%, closing at $387. Bitcoin (BTC) also rallied, up roughly 1% to trade near $105,000. Yet MSTR outpaced BTC’s gains. The Nasdaq Composite rose 0
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/05/strategy-stock-outpaces-bitcoin-with-5-gain-on-midweek-bounce/

data.title: Bitcoin ATM operator CoinFlip seeks buyer for potential $1 billion sale: report
data.description:
CoinFlip is the second-largest operator of cryptocurrency ATMs with a total of 5,600 locations worldwide.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/357209/bitcoin-atm-operator-coinflip-seeks-buyer-for-potential-1-billion-sale-report?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title:

Bulls would want to retake $106K to turn this around locally and be back in control on this timeframe.

data.title: Pump.fun proposes to endorse an official Elon Musk token
data.description:
The conflict between Donald Trump and Elon Musk led Pump. fun to suggest a PvP token battle, where Musk launches his own official ticker to compete with Official Trump (TRUMP).
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pump-fun-proposes-to-endorse-an-official-elon-musk-token/

data.title: Fact Check: Elon Musk's Alleged Post on Epstein Files
data.description:
Elon Musk's reported post on Epstein files lacks confirmation; no market impact noted.
source: https://coincu.com/341828-elon-musk-epstein-files-claims

data.title: WLFI sends cease-and-desist letter over ‘unauthorized’ Trump wallet — Report
data.description:
World Liberty Financial reportedly sent a letter after the company behind Donald Trump’s memecoin and Magic Eden announced plans to launch an “official $TRUMP wallet. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/donald-trump-world-liberty-financial-cease-desist-letter-crypto-wallets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tesla's stock price plummeted 17%, and its market value evaporated by $100 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market news shows that Tesla (TSLA) stock price fell sharply today, with the intraday decline widening to 17%, and its market value shrinking by about US$100 billion.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: We may see a "crypto IPO frenzy"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arthur Hayes posted on social media today that the market has completed a "cycle" and the spirit of ICO in 2017 has now transformed into the crypto IPO boom of 2025-2027. "This is the beginning of a frenzy that will end with an IPO like EOS that attracts huge amounts of fiat currency and plummets at the opening."

data.title: JPMorgan Plunges Deeper Into Crypto By Letting Clients Use Bitcoin ETFs As Loan Collateral
data.description:
JPMorgan, America’s biggest bank by total assets, is set to let its trading and wealth-management clients use certain crypto-linked assets.
source: https://zycrypto.com/jpmorgan-plunges-deeper-into-crypto-by-letting-clients-use-bitcoin-etfs-as-loan-collateral/

data.title: Crypto Advocacy Groups Rally Around Bill to Protect Crypto Devs
data.description:
The bill, called the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act, aims to establish clear guidelines around how non-custodial platforms and their developers are protected legally.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/crypto-advocacy-groups-rally-around-bill-to-protect-crypto-devs

data.title: Mallers says no bitcoin rehypothecation at Strike — but what about re-pledging?

source: https://protos.com/mallers-says-no-bitcoin-rehypothecation-at-strike-but-what-about-re-pledging/

data.title: Truth Social Registers Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs in Nevada
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that Truth Social has registered Bitcoin and Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in Nevada. This development marks a significant step for the platform in expanding its financial offerings.
